test_cases.description: Verifies the skill provides a structured event taxonomy with Category_Action_Object naming
test_cases.input: Define a tracking plan for a SaaS landing page with hero CTA, contact form, and pricing section

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill produces a form tracking hook that captures start, abandon, and submit events

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill implements UTM parameter preservation across page sessions
test_cases.input: How do I preserve UTM parameters so they stay attached to form submissions even after navigation?
